content: Tailwind CSS v4 released early 2025, stable for production. Breaking change from v3: no tailwind.config.js required; use CSS-first @theme directive instead. New Vite plugin @tailwindcss/vite replaces PostCSS setup. Install: npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite, add tailwindcss() to vite plugins, add @import 'tailwindcss' to CSS. shadcn/ui has full Tailwind v4 + React 19 support as of Feb 2025.
